title: End Watchers (Horror)
description: A horror mod that adds simple tall black entities to the end to watch you from afar
body:
''Barren wastelands as far as the eyes can see. ''Empty'' defines this place well. The void spans this whole world, staring back at all who dare tread these lands. The void is alive, the void oversees the islands and above all else, It does not like visitors.''

 

End Watchers is a simple mod that adds one entity to the End: the End Watcher. It simply looks at the player from afar, observing their every move.

---

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

They can come in multiple variants, all doing pretty much the same thing. A standing variant, a crouching one and a posing one. When they spawn, they will sometimes play noises, which are distorted quiet low-pitched voices that say ''Hey'', ''I see you'' and ''Behind you'', adding to the ambience.

Rarely, it can become aggressive. When a player gets close to these aggressive ones, they will get lifted from the ground and a jumpscare will play. After a while, they go away.

</details>

They cannot harm the player and simply are there to add a tiny bit of horror to the End. They aren't dwellers or anything of that sort and won't become one either. Dimension specific horror mods aren't common, so I wanted to make my own :). Also, I swear that a mod adding black silhouettes to the End existed somewhere, but I guess I was just misremembering things, so I decided to make my own version of this.

### **Requires Geckolib to work.**

**Made with MCreator**
